description: With a supportive ankle Fit and crafted from soft ribbed cotton, these no show ankle socks from fila make a great buy. And what better way to enhance your comfort level than these comfortable socks in grey.Made of soft ribbed cotton for a secure fit and exemplary comfortCushioned foot-bed for absolute shock absorption and enhanced comfortSoftly elasticated broad ankle opening to ensure a soft gripBrand name printed on the cuffSock careMachine wash in warm water at 30 degrees using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry low in a delicate cycleDo not iron
